composition_set: Down-Tempo Punk Bluegrass / Alien House Suite

live_template.name: GTandDiedTooSoons Live 12 Foundation Template
live_template.target_runtime: Ableton Live 12 Suite with Max for Live

must_not: export or publish without release QA
log private performance content by default
source_contract.output: Human-reviewable DAW action plan, Max for Live contract update, or local-only session receipt.

purpose: Reviewable proposal queue for building the generated downtempo punk-bluegrass suite in Ableton Live 12 with Max for Live.

must_not: commit .als, .amxd, .alp, plugins, presets, samples, renders, credentials, cookies, or license files
write raw public-domain sample paths into tracked generated artifacts
use unapproved source audio in the Public Domain Source Deck
claim scientific psyche effects without a reviewed study protocol and evidence

layer_actions.instrument_strategy: Banjo-imitation rack using pluck envelope, resonator EQ, velocity layers, and MPE/pitch-bend articulation where available.
Ableton String Quartet or Arturia Augmented STRINGS, layered with subtle pitch drift.
Short plucked sampler/rack layer, high-mid transient emphasis, gated room.
Resonator-like slide layer or guitar-source Arturia bank routed through granular delay.
Layer upright-like transient with sine/triangle sub; sidechain from kick.
layer_actions.session_role: Bluegrass root movement fused with deep-house low end

layer_actions.instrument_strategy: Steel-string guitar rack or verified Arturia guitar-source patch with tight low-mid control and transient-preserved strums.
layer_actions.session_role: Bluegrass rhythm bed and punk strum anchor

layer_actions.instrument_strategy: Dry acoustic kit, parallel saturation, short room.

layer_actions.gm_placeholder: GM drum machine plus synth-stab channel
layer_actions.instrument_strategy: Classic drum-machine racks, 303/101-style bass or stabs, restrained sidechain.
layer_actions.session_role: Kick, hats, stabs, and dance-floor continuity

layer_actions.instrument_strategy: Granulator III, Inspired by Nature, PitchLoop89, spectral/freeform processing.

mix_and_release_gates.instruction: Confirm pre-master headroom is at least -6 dBFS before any limiter.
Confirm source credits, source ledger records, CI status, and local install receipts before export or release.

preflight_actions.instruction: Before any Live-set mutation, save a timestamped local rollback copy outside Git.
Do not upload private rehearsal audio, unreleased lyrics, or controller recordings without session-specific consent.

tracks.title: Rail Yard Ghost in the Control Room
